title: Docs: Update links, add links to latest
body:
These links do not require any login to google and can be used directly (e.g. with `curl`).

Also update the script in the upload container, to fix URIs & make `$ALSO_FILENAME` optional (for future use).

comments.body:
> Do I need to append here too? Looks like a raw list.

TBH, I'm not thrilled with sending people to that API-page, to go trolling through XML manually.  Ideally, we'd have a page that could slurp up the XML and present a nice table of links.  Know anyone with HTML/Scripting mojo that could do it?

Let me see what I can do to make things more clear for the short-term...

@TomSweeneyRedHat hmm, tried to fix, I still don't like it.  Maybe it would be best if I just leave those two "index" bullets off for now?  So, only include the links any idiot can click on, for a "just downloads the thing" experience.
@TomSweeneyRedHat nevermind, I just went ahead and clobbered the index links.  Simpler this way.  Added another commit with some minor/related fixups to the upload container image we use.
